stemHtml: State the legal limit of the blood alcohol level (by concentration) in aviation.

options.a: 0.02% or more restrictive by the operator when preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.b: 0.2% or more restrictive by the operator excluding preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.c: 0.2% or more restrictive by the operator when preparing the flight and during flight operations.
options.d: 0.02% or more restrictive by the operator excluding preparing the flight and during flight operations.
